name: subagent findings format validator rejects a finding item missing the file field
command: printf '[{"severity":"P1","line":10,"finding":"x","suggested_fix":"y"}]\n' > findings.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/agents/validate-findings.sh" --findings findings.json 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'missing.*file' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
